description: Enable authentication and ip whitelist rules. Use type 'cookie' for session-based login or 'basic' (default) for HTTP Basic Auth.

type.description: Authentication type. 'basic' uses HTTP Basic Auth (default). 'cookie' enables session-based login with a login page.

filter.description: Database filter for anonymous users and IP-whitelisted users

roles.description: Role definitions. Each role can have an optional database filter and readOnly flag.

filter.description: Database filter applied to users with this role (overridden by per-user filter)

readOnly.description: Disables tag edition for this role

users.description:
Passwords can be in plain text, {SHA} or {SHA256-salted}.

Hashed password can be generated via
  node -e "pw=process.argv[1];const {createHash,randomBytes}=require('crypto');salt=randomBytes(12);hash=createHash('sha256').update(salt.toString()+pw).digest('base64');console.log('{SHA256-salted}'+salt.toString('base64')+'.'+hash)" 'password'
  {SHA256-salted}FkcbhhcHYW0DdE9u.P9Ik9MG8ldtO0fzGB+RV186vi8PZMomsya5OWC0AEiA=
  node -e "pw=process.argv[1]||'';sha1=require('crypto').createHash('sha1').update(pw).digest('base64');console.log('{SHA}'+sha1)" password
  {SHA}W6ph5Mm5Pz8GgiULbPgzG37mj9g=

anyOf.description: User object with dedicated username, password and optional role properties

filter.description: Database filter for the user (takes priority over role filters)

roles.description: List of role names assigned to this user

readOnly.description: Disables tag edition for this user (overrides role readOnly setting)

rules.description:
Rules when the request need authentication
First matching rule wins.

For public gallery use
rules:
  - allow: localhost
  - deny: all

allow.description: Allow rules without authentication like localhost

deny.description: Deny rules which hosts requires authentication like all
